{{Quote|I believe the Republic has every right to defend itself and drive the Sith back where they came from.|translated=1|Jhosa's thoughts on the [[Jedi Civil War]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''</ref>}}
'''Jhosa''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Selkath/Legends|Selkath]] who lived during the [[Jedi Civil War]]. He was a judge on the [[Ahto City Civil Authority]] court. A moderate supporter of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], Jhosa believed the Republic was in the right to defend against the aggression of the [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|Sith Empire]], although he had doubts as to their ability.
